backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Memory Increase app, managing user profiles, science chapter notes, game states, and high scores with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing all frontend source files and components involved in the full rebuild and redeployment of the Memory Increase Brain Training Game application.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing the purpose of pages, components, hooks, and configuration files in the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, PWA manifest and icon links, and JSON-LD structured data for the Memory Increase brain training game.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest defining app name, icons, display mode, theme colors, shortcuts to card matching and progress pages, and screenshot metadata.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for static assets and network-first strategy for HTML/scripts, with install-time pre-caching and old cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the React app with TanStack Query and Router, defining all page routes (games, progress, install guide) under a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Renders a single flip card with a 3D CSS rotation animation, showing a back face by default and a front face (emoji/value) when flipped or matched.
frontend/src/components/CardGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of Card components for the card matching game, computing column count based on grid size.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Displays a styled game selection card with an icon, title, description, level badge, and a Play button for navigating to a game.
frontend/src/components/GameControls.tsx: Provides Restart and Home buttons for in-game navigation, using TanStack Router's navigate for routing.
frontend/src/components/GameScore.tsx: Modal overlay shown on game completion, displaying time, moves, and score with Play Again and Menu navigation options.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell with a sticky header containing the logo, background music controls with a volume slider, nav links, and an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/NoteCard.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PatternGrid.tsx: Renders an interactive or display-only grid of toggle cells for the pattern memory game, highlighting active cells and supporting click callbacks.
frontend/src/components/SequenceItem.tsx: A single button tile for the sequence memory game, styled differently based on active, selected, or disabled states.
frontend/src/components/SlidingTile.tsx: Renders a single tile for the sliding puzzle, showing either a numbered gradient button or an empty dashed placeholder for the blank space.
frontend/src/components/StroopDisplay.ts: Displays a color word in a mismatched ink color and renders four color answer buttons for the Stroop effect game.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Custom hook managing a looping background audio element with play/pause toggle and volume control.
frontend/src/hooks/useCardGame.ts: Custom hook managing a card-matching memory game with emoji pairs, handling card flipping, match detection, move counting, and level-based grid sizing.
frontend/src/hooks/useFillInTheBlanks.ts: Custom hook for a fill-in-the-blanks game that tracks score, streak, wrong attempts, and feedback while cycling through random sentences from a database.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameTimer.ts: Custom hook providing a stopwatch timer with start, stop, and reset controls, tracking elapsed milliseconds via an interval ref.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing login status, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemoryTest.ts: Custom hook for an emoji memory test game with memorize and recall phases, countdown timers, guess submission, and level-based difficulty scaling.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissingLetter.ts: Custom hook for a missing-letter word game that masks random characters in words, tracks score and streak, and supports easy/hard difficulty selection.
frontend/src/hooks/usePatternMemory.ts: Custom hook for a grid-based pattern memory game where users memorize a highlighted cell pattern and reproduce it, with level-based grid size and memorize time scaling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching player game state, high scores, and user profiles, plus mutations for completing levels, memory tests, and saving user profiles via a backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreCalculation.t: Utility hook exposing a score calculation function that computes a score based on time taken, move count, and level multiplier.
frontend/src/hooks/useSequenceMemory.ts: Custom hook for a sequence memory game that generates and displays a colored emoji sequence, then tracks user input attempts to match it, managing display/input/won/lost phases with timers.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlidingPuzzle.ts: Custom hook for a sliding puzzle game that generates a solvable tile grid (3x3 or 4x4 based on level), handles tile movement, and tracks move count and completion state.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundEffects.ts: Custom hook that provides a playSound function using the Web Audio API to generate click, success, and error sound effects via oscillators.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeedTyping.ts: Custom hook for a 60-second speed typing game that tracks typed input against a random target text, calculates WPM and accuracy, and manages game active/over states with a countdown timer.
frontend/src/hooks/useStroopEffect.ts: Custom hook for a Stroop effect game that presents color-word pairs where the word and ink color differ, tracks score across configurable rounds with a 30-second countdown timer.
frontend/src/hooks/useWordScramble.ts: Custom hook for a word scramble game that fetches random words, scrambles them, validates user input, and tracks score and streak with correct/wrong feedback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a brain-training-themed design system with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes using purple, cyan, and pink color palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CardMatchingGame.tsx: Card matching game page component that orchestrates game state, timer, sound effects, score calculation, and submits completed level results to the backend via the completeLevel mutation.
frontend/src/pages/FillInTheBlanksGame.t: React page component for a 'Fill in the Blanks' word game that displays a sentence with a blank, accepts user text input, checks answers with sound effects, and tracks score and streak.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that displays a hero section and two categorized grids of game cards—Brain Training Games and Language Games—each linking to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/InstallGuide.tsx: Static informational page that provides step-by-step instructions for installing the Memory Increase app as a PWA on Chrome (desktop and mobile).
frontend/src/pages/LanguageSelectionPage: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryTestGame.tsx: React page for a memory test game where players memorize displayed emoji objects and then recall them by typing, with score submission to a backend via Internet Identity on completion.
frontend/src/pages/MissingLetterGame.tsx: React page for a 'Missing Letter' word game that shows a word with hidden letters, lets users select easy/hard difficulty, accepts typed answers, and tracks score and streak with sound feedback.
frontend/src/pages/NotesPage.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/PatternMemoryGame.tsx: A pattern memory game page where players memorize and reproduce a grid pattern, tracking elapsed time and attempts, with level completion reported to the backend via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Displays a player's progress including current level, score, time, and high scores fetched from the backend; shows a login prompt if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/SequenceMemoryGame.ts: A sequence memory game page where players watch and repeat a displayed sequence, with timer, sound effects, score calculation, and backend level completion reporting.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: An empty settings page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/SlidingPuzzleGame.tsx: A sliding puzzle game page where players arrange tiles in order, tracking elapsed time and move count, with score display and backend level completion on success.
frontend/src/pages/SpeedTypingGame.tsx: A speed typing game page where players type a target text within a time limit, displaying real-time WPM and accuracy stats with a results screen on completion.
frontend/src/pages/StroopEffectGame.tsx: A Stroop effect game page where players identify ink colors of color-name words across multiple rounds, tracking score and reporting completion to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: An empty subjects page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/WordScrambleGame.tsx: React page component for a Word Scramble game that displays a scrambled word, accepts user input, checks answers, and plays sound effects on correct/incorrect submissions.
frontend/src/utils/difficultyConfig.ts: Defines difficulty configuration presets (grid size, timing, counts) for six game types across five difficulty levels, with a helper function to retrieve the config for a given game and level.
frontend/src/utils/sentenceDatabase.ts: Exports a static array of fill-in-the-blank sentences with answers and a helper function to return a random sentence from the list.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/wordDatabase.ts: Exports two word lists (easy short words and hard longer words) and a helper function to return a random word based on the specified difficulty level.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, font family, accordion keyframe animations, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Memory Increase Brain Training Game ICP deployment, tracking version, known canister resolution errors, existing features, and a pending rebuild/redeploy request.
